# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: "security.istio.io/v1beta1"
kind: "AuthorizationPolicy"
metadata: 
    name : 'service-account'   # The policy definition has the same id as its parent resource (ServiceAccount) in case of Istio resources, e.g., VirtualService or DestinationRule for a Service
spec:
    selector: {"match":{"source_name":"default"}}  # This controls which service accounts get targeted by this rule based on source name   'virtual-service' is the parent resource id here in case of Istio resources. You should replace it with your actual destination rules/ virtual services IDs
    action: ALLOW     // Action to take if no explicit deny policy matches (in a shorthand, "allow" or omitted)
